title: Curver Faux Rattan Storage Tray, White, Small/1.25 Litre
features: Small shallow storage tray to help you stay organised
Perfect for jewellery, trinkets and bits and bobs
Attractive rattan pattern and cream finish
description: Product Description Jewellery and trinkets in your bedroom, items of stationery in your home office, cotton buds in the bathroom - just the thing for keeping smaller things organised, this handy and versatile little tray will also fit in drawers. With a cream faux rattan finish that will look good in any home, there's a range of shapes and sizes available in the range to cover all your storage needs. About the Faux Rattan Storage Range Toys in the bedroom, magazines in the living room, toiletries in the bathroom - wherever we turn, there's something that needs a home or clutter that needs to be organised. In a whole array of shapes and sizes, there's bound to be something to fit the bill in our range of woven-effect storage trays, baskets and pots. As practical as they are pretty, they're all made from durable, rust-free, easy-clean polypropylene.14x 20 x 6cm H. 1.25 litre. 14x 20 x 6cm H. 1.25 litre. Box Contains 1 x Curver Faux Rattan Storage Tray Small - 1.25 Litre
